stories.headline: 'The Real L Word' Star Francine Beppu's Cause of Death Revealed - TMZ
stories.summary: Francine Beppu died by suicide … TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: Tom Holland has something to say about those Zendaya wedding headlines - NBC News
stories.summary: Holland appears to have confirmed that he and his longtime love have already said “I do.”

stories.headline: Summer House Recap: The Aftermath is Mathing - Vulture
stories.summary: Bravo’s emergency episode gives clarity into Amanda and West’s thinking that the reunion episodes just couldn’t.

stories.headline: 'Toy Story 5' Eyes $275M Global Franchise Record Box Office Opening - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Toy Story 5' is looking at opening to the best ever for the franchise with a global opening of $275M. In North America, with $140M it will be the best start YTD at box office.

stories.headline: Jennifer Lopez Says She Had "Very Little Help" Raising Her and Marc Anthony's Twins - E! Online
stories.summary: Jennifer Lopez reflected on her "crazy" motherhood journey as her and ex Marc Anthony's 18-year-old twins Emme and Max graduate high school, sharing that she had "had very little help" in parenting.

stories.headline: 5 Zodiac Signs With Very Good Horoscopes On Wednesday, June 17, 2026 - YourTango
stories.summary: On June 17, 2026, five zodiac signs have very good horoscopes. They are: Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn, Aquarius, and Pisces.
